tasks.subject: Task 0: Branch setup — feat/patch7-mode2-enable off main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land changes on a dedicated feature branch off main, per the project's PR-only workflow. Move the existing spec commit dabd30d from spec/release-workflow to the new branch.

**Files:** none (git only).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- On a new branch feat/patch7-mode2-enable based on origin/main
- Spec commit dabd30d is reachable from the new branch (cherry-pick)
- Working tree clean

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git log --oneline main..HEAD`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git log --oneline main..HEAD", "acceptanceCriteria": ["On branch feat/patch7-mode2-enable based on origin/main", "Spec commit dabd30d cherry-picked", "Working tree clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Unarchive patch7 in oem/oneplus_canoe.c
tasks.description:
**Goal:** kOemOneplusPatches[] is a single-entry table containing the patch7 descriptor, with no #ifdef GBL_PATCH7_ENABLED anywhere.

**Files:**
- Modify: GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/oem/oneplus_canoe.c

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No occurrences of GBL_PATCH7_ENABLED anywhere in the repo
- kOemOneplusPatches[] contains exactly one entry, named patch7-orange-screen, .Scope = SCOPE_OEM_ONEPLUS, .Mandatory = FALSE
- kOemOneplusPatchesCount uses sizeof()/sizeof()
- File doc comment no longer says 'archived from active mode-1 table'
- make -s -C tools/abl-patcher rebuilds clean
- bash tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh passes

**Verify:** `! grep -rn GBL_PATCH7_ENABLED GblChainloadPkg tools tests && make -s -C tools/abl-patcher && bash tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/oem/oneplus_canoe.c"], "verifyCommand": "! grep -rn GBL_PATCH7_ENABLED GblChainloadPkg tools tests && make -s -C tools/abl-patcher && bash tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GBL_PATCH7_ENABLED removed from repo", "kOemOneplusPatches[] has 1 entry named patch7-orange-screen", "kOemOneplusPatchesCount uses sizeof()/sizeof()", "tools/abl-patcher rebuilds clean", "tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update tests/patches/test_patch7.c for active-table wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Test reflects that patch7 is no longer archived. Adds a kOemOneplusPatches[] membership assertion that runs before fixture-dependent checks; existing byte-level checks keep passing.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/patches/test_patch7.c

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- File comment no longer says 'archived from the active mode-1 aggregator table'
- Adds externs for kOemOneplusPatches[] and kOemOneplusPatchesCount
- Asserts kOemOneplusPatchesCount >= 1 and finds an entry .Name == 'patch7-orange-screen' with non-null .Apply
- Membership check runs BEFORE fixture load (so SKIP path still executes it)
- All existing byte-level checks still pass

**Verify:** `make -s -C tests/patches test_patch7 && (cd tests/patches && ./test_patch7)`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/patches/test_patch7.c"], "verifyCommand": "make -s -C tests/patches test_patch7 && (cd tests/patches && ./test_patch7)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["File comment updated (no 'archived' language)", "Membership assertion runs before fixture-dependent checks", "Existing anchor/CBZ/idempotency checks pass on fixture", "SKIP path emits 'ok patch7 table membership' before SKIP"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Extend tests/host/083 to assert patch7 applied with --oem oneplus
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Close the TODO in tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh. Verify patch7 IS applied with --oem oneplus --no-mode1 and NOT applied with default abl-patcher invocation.

**Files:**
- Modify: tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Coverage-note comment updated (no GBL_PATCH7_ENABLED reference)
- Test 1 asserts grep -qF 'patch7-orange-screen' on m2.log
- Test 2 asserts ! grep -qF 'patch7-orange-screen' on m1.log
- Existing mode_1 / unknown-oem checks unchanged
- Regression gate (060, 062, 045) still green

**Verify:** `bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Coverage note updated", "Test 1 asserts patch7-orange-screen present in --oem oneplus run", "Test 2 asserts patch7-orange-screen absent in default run", "Regression gate (060, 062, 045) still passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Widen zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh OEM detect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** detect_oem accepts the full oplus family (oneplus / oppo / oplus / realme), all mapped to OEM_ID=oneplus.

**Files:**
- Modify: zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Case branch reads `*oneplus*|*oppo*|*oplus*|*realme*) OEM_ID=oneplus ;;`
- Unknown OEM still aborts with the existing message
- bash -n parses clean

**Verify:** `bash -n zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh && grep -n 'oneplus.*oppo.*oplus.*realme' zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash -n zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh && grep -n 'oneplus.*oppo.*oplus.*realme' zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["case branch matches *oneplus*|*oppo*|*oplus*|*realme*", "abort path unchanged", "bash -n parses clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: On-device verify orange-state warning is gone in mode-2
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Goal:** Build a mode-2 EFI with patch7 enabled, stage on the infiniti test phone via fastboot stage + oem boot-efi (never fastboot flash), and confirm: (1) orange-state warning screen no longer renders on boot, (2) mode-2 attestation baseline still passes.

**Files:** none (host build + on-device execution + log capture).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- dist/mode-2.efi built from feat/patch7-mode2-enable HEAD
- EFI staged via fastboot stage + oem boot-efi (no fastboot flash)
- Orange-state warning screen does NOT render on boot (visual)
- dmesg + logcat + getprop captured under logs/<ts>_manual_mode2-patch7-on_v<sha>/
- Key attestation reports PASS (matches 2026-05-18 baseline)
- Widevine / RKP / Strongbox / SOTER unchanged from 2026-05-18 baseline

**Verify:** Manual — see plan §Task 5.

⚠️ SAFETY: CLAUDE.md §Safety blocks fastboot flash / oem unlock/lock / flashing unlock_critical / --set-active / erase for non-HLOS partitions. Stage + oem boot-efi only.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "scripts/build.sh --mode 2 && echo MANUAL_STEPS_REQUIRED", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dist/mode-2.efi built from feat/patch7-mode2-enable HEAD", "EFI staged via fastboot stage + oem boot-efi (no flash)", "orange-state warning screen does NOT render on boot (visual)", "dmesg + logcat + getprop captured under logs/<ts>_manual_mode2-patch7-on_v<sha>/", "key attestation reports PASS (matches 2026-05-18 baseline)", "Widevine/RKP/Strongbox/SOTER unchanged from 2026-05-18 baseline"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "user", "failurePolicy": "stop"}
```
